hero.title: Senior Front-end Engineer
hero.subtitle: I build high-performance web applications with modern tech stacks. Specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript with a focus on architecture and user experience.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who I Am
about.description: Front-end Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and building high-performance web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js, and TypeScript, with deep expertise in software architecture, performance optimization, and testing automation.
about.description2: Currently working as a Full-Stack Engineer at Partnerz (Dubai), I've contributed to products serving 200+ universities globally and a mental health study with 20,000+ participants.

contact.title: Get in Touch
